title: VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION - 211info
text: HARNEY COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides childhood immunizations and some adult immunizations. Offers influenza (flu) vaccines as they become available each season, along with vaccine information. 420 N Fairview Avenue Burns, OR 97720 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:00am-noon and 1pm-5pm Friday 8:30-noon 1-2:30pm Closed on holidays (541) 573-2271 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 573-2271 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurance, sliding scale fees offered to uninsured patients. No child will be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Immunization record and insurance information, if available LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Harney County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on North Fairview directly across the street from Harney District Hospital Services: Childhood Immunization Flu Vaccines Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HIGH COUNTRY HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER PRIMARY CARE PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - COMMUNICABLE DISEASE PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HARNEY COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
